name: Bahagia Yang Tertangguh
overview: Betrayed by Zakwan and used by Juriah, Hana rises to find new hope with Armin, whose love is pure and sincere. Yet, Azrin’s jealousy and Armin’s family disapproval test the love that has just begun to bloom.

trailers.title: [TAYANGAN PERDANA] BAHAGIA YANG TERTANGGUH - BERMULA 17 NOVEMBER 2025 DI ASTRO RIA
